entry.title: IDC DAAB0703DB010 (ARZ991) awarded to AECOM MANAGEMENT SERVICES CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: UNIQUE ENTITY ID OR LEGAL BUSINESS NAME CHANGE - NON-NOVATION

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION IS TO EXECUTE THE APPROVED CHANGE OF NAME AGREEMENT FROM URS FEDERAL SERVICES, INC. TO AECOM MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC.. THE CHANGE OF NAME AGREEMENT HAS BEEN FULLY EXECUTED AND IS DATED 31 OCTOBER 2018. THIS CHANGE OF NAME IS ALSO APPLICABLE TO THE HARD COPY CHECK REMITTANCE.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: R&D- DEFENSE SYSTEM: ELECTRONICS/COMMUNICATION EQUIPMENT (APPLIED RESEARCH/EXPLORATORY DEVELOPMENT)

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT IN THE PHYSICAL, ENGINEERING, AND LIFE SCIENCES

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: URS FEDERAL SERVICES, INC., AN AECOM COMPANY
